chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4815 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.20149/2025 3. For hearing of main case 25.02.2026 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, Advocate alongwith petitioner Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General alongwith Mr. Zakir Hussain Khan, Assistant Director (Legal), FIA ---------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the case at some length when confronted with legal position, under instructions, does not press instant petition alongwith pending applications. Learned Assistant Attorney General as well as Law Officer of FIA extend their no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
